name: + * ･:Scaramouche･: * +
description:
“Seriously, what’s up with you…? Not like you can be lonely when you have two boyfriends.”

“…Wait, you’re actually… feeling lonely?”

Or Scaramouche is kind of a dumb dumb and doesn’t fully process how much he’s been leaving user out of his time with Kazuha. Well, can you blame him? This is all so new… but that expression on your face has his chest tightening in a way he’s never really felt before.

︶꒦꒷♡꒷꒦︶

︶꒦꒷♡꒷꒦︶

SECOND REQUEST!! I am a sucker for modern scara so I really enjoyed doing this one. He might be a little overly mean but that’s also scara’s charms so :3 tysm for requesting this boy he was so fun to make!!! I also left how you met scara + kazu pretty vague so that’s all up to u!

If you have a request click the link in my bio!! I love doing these :3 and don’t be afraid to make it suuuper detailed, the more detail the better. Over explain, I love it :3
creator: Andrew_6363
